address: Priory Street, Coventry, CV1 5FB, United Kingdom
course_duration: 1 year full-time; up to 2 years full-time with professional placement
mandatory_documents_required: Academic transcripts, undergraduate degree certificate (2:2 or above in aerospace/aeronautical/mechanical engineering or related discipline), personal statement, two academic references, proof of English language proficiency (IELTS or equivalent), valid passport copy
yearly_tuition_fee: Refer to Postgraduate Finance page on coventry.ac.uk for current fee; international fees differ from UK/home fees. EU student bursary available to bring fees in line with UK rates.
scholarship_availability: A range of International Scholarships are available. Coventry University graduates receive a 25% alumni discount on postgraduate tuition fees from September 2025. All scholarships are subject to availability, visa requirements, and competitive application.
english_waiver_moi: English language requirement may be waived if previous degree was taught entirely in English. See entry requirements on the course page for details.
min_ielts: 6.5 overall, with no component lower than 5.5
ug_academic_min_gpa: An honours degree 2:2 or above (or international equivalent) in aerospace, aeronautical engineering, mechanical engineering or related discipline.
